payload.author: claude
payload.body: FOUNDATION done + verified: src/auth_hosted/tenancy.js resolves the active board from the subject (X-Scope-Project header / ?project / session tenant_id claim) and validates membership - never trusts an unauthenticated workspace header. Cross-tenant read returns 404 (non-members not told a board exists). Applies to the migrated endpoints; the not-yet-migrated generic endpoints still read the header (covered by the SCP-186 remaining-surface migration).
